videos.title: SKI EXPERIENCE AT NAKAJIMA PARK
videos.description:
At the Sapporo Language Center, you can experience Cross-country skiing in winter.
There is a lot of snow, especially this year, so the students enjoyed walking in the snow. 
Everyone was very good at skiing! 

#sapporo
#crosscountryskiiing
#nakajimapark
#hokkaido
#winter
#snow
#nihongo
#japanese
#japaneselanguageschool

Hokkaido Bankei ski 2018 yi 4k+ Walter and John Run
Philipp the Race Reporter at the Sapporo Skimarathon 2019
videos.description:
The Worldloppet Race Reporter Philipp travelled to Japan, to the Sapporo Skimarathon, to check the race out for you and to collect a stamp in his passport! 
Check out Philipps experience in Japan!

videos.title: SAPPORO - Coolest city in the world? Deep pow and city life  all in one sign me up
videos.description:
This winter we spent a good chunk of time in this insane city. Two million people live in this snowy place and a short car ride away you have untouched powder, everywhere. Feels unreal. no other people in the slopes. A dream come true. We did it all this trip; skied pow, onsen, sushi, vintage shopping, clubbing, light ceremonies, hot chef, umeshu, yep,  you name it we most likely did it. And we still didn't have enough. I never wanted to leave. 10/10 recommend this crazy place. Cant wait to go back. 

Arrigato Sapporo we love you!

/Malou :)
